title: Update architectureStore for new data model
description: Update the architectureStore to support Module/Feature/Parameter hierarchy and ECharts tree generation
acceptance: Store supports new data model and can generate ECharts tree data

title: Create ECharts MindMap component
description: Create a new MindMapView component using ECharts Tree, read-only, with click-to-locate feature
acceptance: Component renders tree from data, supports click events, read-only mode

title: Create ArchitectureTable component
description: Create a tree table component for Module/Feature/Parameter with CRUD operations
acceptance: Component supports expand/collapse, CRUD for all three levels, search/filter

title: Integrate components in +page.svelte
description: Update the architecture page to use new MindMapView and ArchitectureTable components with tab switching
acceptance: Page has two tabs, data syncs between views, version switching works
